description: Phase 6 — Semantic Density: Well Count Test. One fused compound well (A) vs. two distinct wells (B) vs. three distinct wells (C) vs. P_d baseline (D). Same artifact as exp-10b.
notes: Well Count Test. Hypothesis: consideration-set depth is a function of semantic well count in the Persona — 1 fused compound well > 2 unfused wells > 3 unfused wells > P_d. Token count held roughly equal across A/B/C. Primary metric: issue sections/run and ceiling rate. A replicates exp-10b A (dense P_p). D replicates exp-10b C (P_d baseline). B and C introduce new well-count conditions.
